reason: This is a high-quality sample with a coherent task blueprint, a believable synthetic user (ceramic artist small business owner), and a grounded assistant that correctly uses tools and reports accurate results. All four blueprint goals are completed: markup pricing ($43.75 selling price), investment growth projections (5-10 year scenarios at 4-7%), rate/period comparisons, and promotional discount planning (15-20% recommended). The assistant stays well-grounded in tool outputs, correctly carries forward the $43.75 selling price from the markup calculation into the discount table tool. The only minor note is that the tool names in the trajectory have 'skill-tools-' prefixes, but this is explicitly noted as harmless in the guidance. No significant deductions warranted.
